In this episode of The Gaurav Thakur Show, we’re joined by Raghav Kumar - founder of Raghav Research Services LLP, a SEBI-registered Research Analyst firm that specializes in identifying multibagger opportunities in India’s micro-cap and SME sectors.

Raghav isn’t just an investor, he’s a strategist, educator, and macroeconomic thinker who has empowered millions with his deep, research-driven insights on long-term wealth creation. With an MBA in Finance and a laser focus on value investing, business scaling, and financial discipline, he’s helping Indian investors shift from short-term speculation to building lasting generational wealth.
